---
title: "xinerama won't work (ubuntu 6.06)"
date: 2006-08-10
forum: Desktop Environments
---

### Post by paperdiesel on 2006-08-10
I have two video cards and two monitors.  I'm using kubuntu 6.06.  My nvidia card is attached to a ViewSonic monitor, and my SiS card (XGI - Xabre Graphics Inc Volari Z7) is attached to an AOC monitor.  I'm trying to get xinerama to work, and this is my xorg.conf:


But this will not work.  In fact, when I use this config, I can't get x to start at all.  Can someone help me figure this out?
